x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Now Assist is entitlement-gated. Without confirmed SKU entitlement, plugins install but AI features do not activate. Entitlement must be verified before any Now Assist configuration work begins.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Contact your ServiceNow account team to confirm Now Assist SKU entitlement for each module. Request entitlement confirmation in writing. Do not begin Now Assist configuration without confirmed entitlement.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_87f85dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c34
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="x_snc_airop_check_definition"><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><ai_justification><![CDATA[Now Assist is entitlement-gated. Without confirmed SKU entitlement, plugins install but AI features do not activate. Entitlement must be verified before any Now Assist configuration work begins.]]></ai_justification><check_name>Now Assist Entitlement Verification</check_name><check_script><![CDATA[(function() {
    var t = new GlideRecord("samp_sw_license_metric");
    if (!t.isValid()) {
        return { status: "value_blocker", actualValue: "Required table samp_sw_license_metric not found", finding: "License Metric table is not available. Verify the SAM plugin is active." };
    }
    var matched = {};
    function collectMatches(keyword) {
        var gr = new GlideRecord("samp_sw_license_metric");
        gr.addQuery("name", "CONTAINS", keyword);
        gr.query();
        while (gr.next()) { matched[gr.getUniqueValue()] = true; }
    }
    collectMatches("now_assist");
    collectMatches("NowAssist");
    collectMatches("now assist");
    var count = Object.keys(matched).length;
    var actualValue = count + " Now Assist license metric record(s) found";
    if (count > 0) {
        return { status: "ready", actualValue: actualValue, finding: count + " Now Assist license metric record(s) found. Confirm specific module entitlements (ITSM, ITOM, HRSD, CSM, etc.) with your ServiceNow account team." };
    } else {
        return { status: "value_blocker", actualValue: actualValue, finding: "No Now Assist license metric records found. Now Assist is entitlement-gated — confirm SKU entitlement with your ServiceNow account team before beginning configuration." };
    }
})()]]></check_script><is_active>true</is_active><is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive><is_manual>false</is_manual><module>PLATFORM</module><number>CHK0000492</number><order>130</order><remediation_guidance>Contact your ServiceNow account team to confirm Now Assist SKU entitlement for each module. Request entitlement confirmation in writing. Do not begin Now Assist configuration without confirmed entitlement.</remediation_guidance><sys_class_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-10 06:41:20</sys_created_on><sys_id>87f85dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c34</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>Now Assist Entitlement Verification</sys_name><sys_package display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform" source="x_snc_airop">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_scope><sys_update_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition_87f85dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c34</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-10 06:54:02</sys_updated_on></x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
